headline: Eaton’s Record Quarter And Deals Reshape Focus On Electrification Growth
summary: Eaton (NYSE:ETN) reported record first quarter 2026 results, supported by demand in key segments and substantial order growth. The company completed about US$11b of acquisitions, including Boyd Thermal and Ultra PCS Limited. Eaton plans to spin off its Mobility segment by early 2027 as part of an ongoing restructuring program. Eaton is a power management company with exposure to areas many investors watch closely, including electrical systems, power reliability, and industrial applications...
